taxonomy: Codonorhiza micrantha is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its flowers and stem structure. Within the Orchidaceae family, Codonorhiza micrantha is placed in the tribe Coelogyneae. The tribe Coelogyneae is further divided into various genera, with Codonorhiza micrantha being one of them. The exact classification of Codonorhiza micrantha may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic research.
